SYNTHETIC FIXTURE — NOT A REAL FILING. Illustrative text only, so the Milestone 2
mock pipeline runs deterministically with no network. Numbers are invented. Do not
cite this in any real analysis.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

UNIFIRST CORPORATION — EXCERPTS FROM ANNUAL REPORT (FISCAL 2024) [SYNTHETIC]

Results of Operations

Revenues for fiscal 2024 were $2.43 billion, an increase of 9.2% over the prior
year, driven by pricing actions and growth in the Core Laundry Operations segment.

Operating margin declined to 7.8% from 8.6% in the prior fiscal year, primarily
due to higher production and energy costs and continued investment in the Company's
enterprise systems.

The Company's Core Laundry Operations organic growth rate was 7.5% for the fiscal
year, reflecting steady demand across most end markets.

Competition

We face significant competition in the uniform rental industry, principally from
Cintas Corporation and Aramark, as well as from regional and local competitors.
